title: Azure Blob Storage Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on Azure blob object storage.

questions.question: Regarding the DevOps, what is the primary role of 'Azure Blob Storage'?
options: Providing reliable and scalable storage for 'unstructured' data in the cloud—such as for images and backup files

questions.question: In Azure Blob Storage, what is a storage unit or container—such as for a project's images—commonly called?
